title: The song from our beginning
story: Replace this prompt with the song connected to your earliest days together and the moment it takes you back to.

title: The song that sounds like us
story: Choose the song that carries a wedding, promise, trip, or ordinary ritual only the two of you fully understand.

title: The song for our family
story: Add the track that belongs to life with Rayden, then explain the specific family scene you see whenever it plays.
